name: friction tracker logs an event when a hook blocks a tool invocation, capturing hook name and decision
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/friction-tracker.sh" --event hook-block --hook lock-acquire --decision deny --at 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'event=hook-block' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && grep -q 'hook=lock-acquire' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && grep -q 'decision=deny' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
